text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Bellom. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Frozen Phoenix into Ancient Kraken.
I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Infernal Leviathan.
I can evolve Celestial Golem into Astral Djinn.
I can evolve Astral Djinn into Solar Kraken.
I can evolve Arcane Leviathan into Infernal Titan.
I can evolve Infernal Titan into Celestial Golem.
I can evolve Frozen Griffin into Mystic Cyclops.
I can evolve Mystic Cyclops into Void Tiger.
I can evolve Thunder Cyclops into Infernal Chimera.
I can evolve Infernal Chimera into Lunar Titan.
I can evolve Arcane Golem into Astral Drake.
I can evolve Astral Drake into Frozen Minotaur.
I can evolve Void Minotaur into Frozen Owlbear.
I can evolve Frozen Owlbear into Wild Manticore.
I can evolve Infernal Specter into Lunar Specter.
I can evolve Lunar Specter into Storm Minotaur.
I can evolve Storm Cyclops into Celestial Titan.
I can evolve Celestial Titan into Thunder Hydra.
I can evolve Celestial Wolf into Arcane Griffin.
I can evolve Arcane Griffin into Infernal Tiger.
I can evolve Lunar Basilisk into Celestial Owlbear.
I can evolve Celestial Owlbear into Storm Golem.
I can evolve Ancient Serpent into Shadow Griffin.
I can evolve Shadow Griffin into Celestial Djinn.
I can evolve Shadow Manticore into Thunder Tiger.
I can evolve Thunder Tiger into Shadow Golem.
I can evolve Void Phoenix into Arcane Tiger.
I can evolve Arcane Tiger into Lunar Specter.
I can evolve Frozen Wyvern into Void Chimera.
I can evolve Void Chimera into Frozen Djinn.
I can evolve Frozen Cyclops into Astral Djinn.
I can evolve Astral Djinn into Mystic Hydra.
I can evolve Solar Wyvern into Astral Titan.
I can evolve Astral Titan into Ancient Hydra.
I can evolve Infernal Minotaur into Shadow Hydra.
I can evolve Shadow Hydra into Mystic Serpent.
I can evolve Mystic Manticore into Ancient Drake.
I can evolve Ancient Drake into Wild Drake.
I can evolve Arcane Golem into Void Owlbear.
I can evolve Void Owlbear into Arcane Cyclops.
I can evolve Lunar Kraken into Solar Hydra.
I can evolve Solar Hydra into Infernal Hydra.
I can evolve Mystic Wolf into Crystal Kraken.
I can evolve Crystal Kraken into Void Wolf.
I can evolve Shadow Titan into Void Golem.
I can evolve Void Golem into Arcane Kraken.
I can evolve Ancient Hydra into Crystal Tiger.
I can evolve Crystal Tiger into Arcane Manticore.
I can evolve Storm Phoenix into Ancient Kraken.
I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Lunar Titan.
I can evolve Mystic Owlbear into Storm Manticore.
I can evolve Storm Manticore into Solar Kraken.
I can evolve Mystic Tiger into Storm Cyclops.
I can evolve Storm Cyclops into Storm Wolf.
I can evolve Crystal Chimera into Arcane Wolf.
I can evolve Arcane Wolf into Crystal Basilisk.
I can evolve Wild Manticore into Astral Wolf.
I can evolve Astral Wolf into Arcane Leviathan.
I can evolve Thunder Hydra into Frozen Specter.
I can evolve Frozen Specter into Void Specter.
Choose a beast evolution.
